就昨晚 (2019-06-26) 網上謠傳指一名便衣警員假扮成示威者，並用鋤頭嘗試打開警察總部鐵閘及煽動示威者作出衝擊行為，警方現澄清以上指控全屬虛構。

該名警務人員當時正在回署上班途中，但行至警察總部外時突然被多名示威者蓄意阻撓。人員於是走到灣仔警署報案室平台入口，但示威者再開始擁上，於是他拿起地上的雪糕筒及清潔水撥作防衛，最後由其他警員協助下返回警署。

警方強調人員在以上事件並沒有扮成示威者或作出任何煽動的行為。警方對有人再次故意散布謠言感到極度遺憾，並予以嚴厲譴責。

Rumour Clarification

Regarding an unverified rumour on web on 2019-06-26 that a plainclothes officer disguised as a protestor, tried to force open the gate of Police Headquarters with a hoe and incited the protestors to storm thereof, Police hereby clarifies that the accusation is a complete fabrication.

The officer was on the way for duty to Police Station. When he walked pass Police Headquarters, a number of protestors obstructed his way on purpose. He then walked to the entrance at the podium of Wan Chai Report Room but the protestors came up again towards the officer who picked up a traffic cone and a windshield wiper for self-defense.

Police emphasises that the officer has neither disguised as a protestor nor made any incitement. Police expresses utmost regret over the intentional spread of rumour and castigates the rumourmongers.澄清謠言
